subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! Thy mention hath been remembered before the Wronged One; therefore have We made mention of thee. Strive thou, that perchance thine insight may be quickened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رحیم ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور لذا ذکرت نمودیم جهد نما شاید بصرت فائز شود
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
